html:
Exclusive to:  

“A 6 slots container that slows the spoiling of items inside.”

-

The Chef Pouch, also known as the Spice Pack, is a character-specific item unique to Warly. The additional inventory slots are 6 and items inside will take 33% longer to spoil. It requires 4 Cut Grass, 4 Twigs and 2 Nitre to craft.

It cannot be placed in the Inventory and will be dropped on the ground when not equipped. Any Item clicked on a Chef Pouch which is on the ground will give the 'Store' option, allowing the pack to be filled without equipping it. It is flammable. Although it looks like a hat, the Chef Pouch is equipped on the body slot.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Woven - Distinguished
Fine Chef Pouch
Yes, Chef!
Woven - Distinguished
Kitchen Scraps Sack
The preferred carryall of the vagabond chef.

Trivia

  • The Chef Pouch was added in the Eye of the Tiger Shark update to Shipwrecked.
  • The Chef Pouch was added in the Warly Character Refresh update to Don't Starve Together.
  • Prior to the Release The Quacken update, the Chef Pouch only had four inventory slots.
  • When the player begins a Don't Starve game as Warly, the Chef Pouch is actually dropped nearby, implying that it is supposed to go into the player's Inventory, but fails, as backpacks cannot be held in the Inventory.

Exclusive to:
“A breakthrough in culinary science!”
–Wilson
“I'm sure Warly won't mind if I borrow this.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will carry all the food!”
–Wolfgang
“To fend off the ravages of decay... for my food at least.”
–Wendy
“EFFICIENT STORAGE FOR ORGANIC MATTER”
–WX-78
“This should keep my provisions from spoiling!”
–Wickerbottom
“A handy knapsack for conserving food!”
–Woodie
“I've been reduced to hauling my own foodstuffs.”
–Maxwell
“I'll use this tö carry deliciöus meats!”
–Wigfrid
“I'm sure Mr. Warly won't mind if we use this!”
–Webber
“My bag of chef's tricks!”
–Warly
“Pack for belly stuff!”
–Wormwood
“Say, this is some fine bit of engineering!”
–Winona
“What a cute little pack. Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Keep foods inside!”
–Wurt
“Specialized spice traveling gear.”
–Walter
“I wonder if it makes time slow down, or if it's just well insulated.”
–Wanda
“A 6 slots container that slows the spoiling of items inside.”
-
The Chef Pouch, also known as the Spice Pack, is a character-specific item unique to Warly. The additional inventory slots are 6 and items inside will take 33% longer to spoil. It requires 4 Cut Grass, 4 Twigs and 2 Nitre to craft.
It cannot be placed in the Inventory and will be dropped on the ground when not equipped. Any Item clicked on a Chef Pouch which is on the ground will give the 'Store' option, allowing the pack to be filled without equipping it. It is flammable. Although it looks like a hat, the Chef Pouch is equipped on the body slot.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Chef Pouch was added in the Eye of the Tiger Shark update to Shipwrecked.
The Chef Pouch was added in the Warly Character Refresh update to Don't Starve Together.
Prior to the Release The Quacken update, the Chef Pouch only had four inventory slots.
When the player begins a Don't Starve game as Warly, the Chef Pouch is actually dropped nearby, implying that it is supposed to go into the player's Inventory, but fails, as backpacks cannot be held in the Inventory.
